description_for_human: Security findings, scores and reports for managed M365 tenants.
description_for_model: Retrieves security findings, overall status, score summaries and suspicious sign-in reports for managed Microsoft 365 customer tenants. Use getTenants first to resolve a customer name to a tenantId, then call detail endpoints.

functions.name: getSecurityOverview
functions.description: Returns security overview for ALL managed tenants: name, critical/high finding counts, secure score and last scan time.

functions.name: getTenants
functions.description: Returns the list of managed customer tenants with IDs and names. Call this first to resolve a customer name to a tenantId.

functions.name: getFindings
functions.description: Returns security findings for a specific tenant. Filter by severity (Critical, High, Medium, Low) or category.

functions.name: getReportSummary
functions.description: Returns the executive security report summary for a tenant: score trend, top risks, resolved findings and recommended actions.

functions.name: getSuspiciousSignins
functions.description: Returns suspicious sign-in events for a tenant: unusual locations, failed logins, BEC indicators.
